Operation 'verifyFace' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description provides good context about the confidence threshold but lacks explicit information about what is returned (confidence score) and clarifies that this is a read-only operation with no side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Verify a face against enrolled subject
data.current_description: Match an image against a specific enrolled subject in a gallery. Confidence threshold of ~60% indicates same person.
data.description_suggestion: Match a provided face image against a specific enrolled subject in a gallery to verify identity. Returns a confidence score where ~60% threshold indicates a match (same person). The operation does not modify gallery state or enrollment data.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description provides good context about the confidence threshold but lacks explicit information about what is returned (confidence score) and clarifies that this is a read-only operation with no side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'recognizeFace' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about what is returned (ranked matches with confidence scores) and the nature of the operation (one-to-many matching). Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the output format and distinguish this from verify (one-to-one) operations.

data.current_description: Identify faces by matching against all enrolled subjects in a gallery.
data.description_suggestion: Identify and match a provided face image against all enrolled subjects in a specified gallery. Returns a ranked list of potential matches with confidence scores for each enrolled subject. This operation performs one-to-many matching across the entire gallery.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about what is returned (ranked matches with confidence scores) and the nature of the operation (one-to-many matching). Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the output format and distinguish this from verify (one-to-one) operations.

message: Operation 'compareFaces' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks output details (confidence score) and important context that this is a gallery-independent operation. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and distinguishes this from verify/recognize operations that require gallery enrollment.

data.current_description: Compare two images to determine if they contain the same person.
data.description_suggestion: Compare two provided face images to determine if they contain the same person. Returns a confidence score indicating the likelihood of a match. This operation does not require gallery enrollment and performs direct image-to-image comparison.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks output details (confidence score) and important context that this is a gallery-independent operation. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and distinguishes this from verify/recognize operations that require gallery enrollment.

message: Operation 'listGalleries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what information is returned (gallery metadata, identifiers, etc.). Enhanced description specifies the output format and clarifies this is a read-only operation, improving AI agent understanding of available data.

data.current_description: Retrieve all galleries that have been created.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all galleries that have been created in the system. Returns gallery metadata including gallery identifiers and creation information. This operation does not filter or modify galleries.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what information is returned (gallery metadata, identifiers, etc.). Enhanced description specifies the output format and clarifies this is a read-only operation, improving AI agent understanding of available data.

message: Operation 'viewGallery' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description lacks input requirements (gallery identifier needed) and output details (what subject information is returned). Enhanced description specifies required inputs and return values, enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: List all subjects enrolled in a specific gallery.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all subjects enrolled in a specified gallery. Requires the gallery identifier as input. Returns subject identifiers and enrollment metadata for each enrolled subject. This operation does not modify gallery or subject data.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks input requirements (gallery identifier needed) and output details (what subject information is returned). Enhanced description specifies required inputs and return values, enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'removeGallery' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (gallery name/identifier) and important side effects (permanent deletion, data loss). Added input requirements and emphasized irreversibility to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.current_description: Delete an entire gallery and all enrolled subjects.
data.description_suggestion: Delete an entire gallery and all enrolled subjects within it. Requires the gallery name as input. This operation permanently removes all face templates and enrollment data associated with the gallery. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (gallery name/identifier) and important side effects (permanent deletion, data loss). Added input requirements and emphasized irreversibility to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'removeSubject' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description is vague about required inputs and doesn't clarify the optional face ID parameter. Missing information about side effects (data removal, irreversibility). Enhanced to specify required parameters, optional parameters, and permanent consequences.

data.current_summary: Remove a subject from a gallery
data.current_description: Remove a subject or a specific face template from a gallery.
data.description_suggestion: Remove a subject or a specific face template from a gallery. Requires gallery name and subject ID as inputs. Optionally accepts a face ID to remove only that specific face template. Removes all associated enrollment data for the subject or face template. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about required inputs and doesn't clarify the optional face ID parameter. Missing information about side effects (data removal, irreversibility). Enhanced to specify required parameters, optional parameters, and permanent consequences.

message: Operation 'getMediaAnalysis' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about what results are returned (emotion classifications, confidence scores, demographics). Missing information about potential pending status. Enhanced to clarify expected outputs and possible states to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve emotion analysis results for previously uploaded media.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve emotion analysis results for previously uploaded media. Requires the media ID obtained from the upload operation. Returns emotion classifications, confidence scores, and demographic insights detected in the media. Results may be pending if analysis is still in progress.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what results are returned (emotion classifications, confidence scores, demographics). Missing information about potential pending status. Enhanced to clarify expected outputs and possible states to improve AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteMedia' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects. Description doesn't emphasize the permanent nature of deletion or that both media and analysis results are removed. Added clarity about irreversibility and scope of deletion to help AI agents understand the destructive consequences.

data.current_description: Remove stored media and associated analysis results.
data.description_suggestion: Remove stored media and associated analysis results. Requires the media ID. Permanently deletes the uploaded media file and all cached emotion analysis results. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description doesn't emphasize the permanent nature of deletion or that both media and analysis results are removed. Added clarity about irreversibility and scope of deletion to help AI agents understand the destructive consequences.

message: Operation 'getMediaAnalytics' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary uses unclear term 'impressions' without context. Description is vague about what specific metrics and insights are returned. Enhanced summary to be more descriptive and added details about returned data types (emotion distributions, demographics, trends) to clarify the operation's analytical output for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get overall impressions and aggregated emotion/demographic insights from analyzed media.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated media analytics and impressions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated analytics and impressions for analyzed media. Requires the media ID. Returns overall impression metrics, aggregated emotion distributions, demographic breakdowns, and temporal trends across all detected faces in the media. Provides high-level insights suitable for reporting and analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary uses unclear term 'impressions' without context. Description is vague about what specific metrics and insights are returned. Enhanced summary to be more descriptive and added details about returned data types (emotion distributions, demographics, trends) to clarify the operation's analytical output for AI agents.

Operation 'verifyFace' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description provides good context about the confidence threshold but lacks explicit information about what is returned (confidence score) and clarifies that this is a read-only operation with no side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Verify a face against enrolled subject
data.current_description: Match an image against a specific enrolled subject in a gallery. Confidence threshold of ~60% indicates same person.
data.description_suggestion: Match a provided face image against a specific enrolled subject in a gallery to verify identity. Returns a confidence score where ~60% threshold indicates a match (same person). The operation does not modify gallery state or enrollment data.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description provides good context about the confidence threshold but lacks explicit information about what is returned (confidence score) and clarifies that this is a read-only operation with no side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'recognizeFace' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about what is returned (ranked matches with confidence scores) and the nature of the operation (one-to-many matching). Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the output format and distinguish this from verify (one-to-one) operations.

data.current_description: Identify faces by matching against all enrolled subjects in a gallery.
data.description_suggestion: Identify and match a provided face image against all enrolled subjects in a specified gallery. Returns a ranked list of potential matches with confidence scores for each enrolled subject. This operation performs one-to-many matching across the entire gallery.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity about what is returned (ranked matches with confidence scores) and the nature of the operation (one-to-many matching). Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the output format and distinguish this from verify (one-to-one) operations.

message: Operation 'compareFaces' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks output details (confidence score) and important context that this is a gallery-independent operation. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and distinguishes this from verify/recognize operations that require gallery enrollment.

data.current_description: Compare two images to determine if they contain the same person.
data.description_suggestion: Compare two provided face images to determine if they contain the same person. Returns a confidence score indicating the likelihood of a match. This operation does not require gallery enrollment and performs direct image-to-image comparison.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks output details (confidence score) and important context that this is a gallery-independent operation. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and distinguishes this from verify/recognize operations that require gallery enrollment.

data.current_description: Delete an entire gallery and all enrolled subjects.

data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (gallery name/identifier) and important side effects (permanent deletion, data loss). Added input requirements and emphasized irreversibility to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.
